zh.lifeSummary: 當John Burnet of Kailzia於大約1614年出生在英國蘇格蘭皮布萊爾曼諾時，他的父親John Burnett of Barnes39歲，母親Margaret Scot35歲。他於1641年與Helen Bailie在英國蘇格蘭皮布萊爾曼諾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1659年11月享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Burnet of Kailzia于大约1614年出生在英国苏格兰皮布萊爾曼諾时，他的父亲John Burnett of Barnes39岁，母亲Margaret Scot35岁。他于1641年与Helen Bailie在英国苏格兰皮布萊爾曼諾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1659年11月享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: Burnet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (central and eastern Scotland): variant of   Burnett  .
French: status name or topographic name from a shortened derivative of   Buron   ‘hut, cottage’.

variants.name: Burnett
meanings: Scottish and Irish (Tyrone and Antrim): descriptive nickname of Norman origin, from Old French burnete, a diminutive of brun ‘brown’ (see Brown ), or possibly in some instances a metonymic occupational name for a maker or seller of burnete, a high quality woolen cloth, originally dark brown in color.
Probably also an altered form of English   Barnett  .
In some cases also an altered form of French   Burnet  ; compare   Burnette  .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: possibly a metonymic occupational name for a fisherman, from orfe, a species of freshwater fish. Alternatively, a habitational name from Urff near Kassel, formerly Orpha.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: When John Burnet of Kailzia was born about 1614, in Manor, Peeblesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, John Burnett of Barnes, was 39 and his mother, Margaret Scot, was 35. He married Helen Bailie in 1641, in Manor, Peeblesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 7 daughters. He died in November 1659, at the age of 46.

Il a épousé Helen Bailie en 1641, à Manor, Valle de Twede, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé en novembre 1659, à l’âge de 46 ans.

Er hat 1641 in Manor, Peeblesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Helen Bailie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb im November 1659 im Alter von 46 Jahren.

ja.lifeSummary: John Burnet of Kailziaが約1614年にイギリススコットランドペエブレシュアイアマノーで生まれた時，父John Burnett of Barnesは39歳，母Margaret Scotは35歳であった。1641年にイギリススコットランドペエブレシュアイアマノーでHelen Bailieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1659年11月に46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Burnet of Kailzia(이)가 대략 1614년 영국 스코틀랜드 피블레실르 먼어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Burnett of Barnes(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Scot(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1641년 영국 스코틀랜드 피블레실르 먼어에서 Helen Bailie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1659년 11월 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Burnet of Kailzia родился около 1614 г. в местности манор, пиблессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Burnett of Barnes было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Scot, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Helen Bailie в 1641 г. в местности манор, пиблессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 7 дочерей. Он умер ноябрь 1659 г. в возрасте 46 лет.
